eng.definition: just coming into existence and beginning to display signs of future potential.
examples: The nascent technology has the potential to revolutionize the industry.
His nascent writing career started to take off.
The nascent movement was gaining momentum.
वह सबसे अधिक सचेत और सतर्क रहता है.
उसने सचेत रहने की सलाह दी.
